name: 28 Experiments in 5 Days — What Works, What Fails, and Why Small-Scale Tests Lie
author: Himanshu Dongre
notes: Research report. 28 controlled experiments across architecture, training, quantization, and eval-time techniques. 14 dead techniques documented with specific numbers. Key finding: small-scale tests can be 180 degrees wrong (SSM: -18% local to +2.7% at scale). Self-funded on Mac Mini M4 + single H100 RunPod (~$12 GPU spend).
